items.briefing:
Several cybersecurity vendors are expanding their presence in Australia this week. Coro has signed a local distribution deal through Leader, meaning Australian businesses may soon have easier access to their security tools. Darwinium has also updated its mobile software to better detect scam activity — relevant as mobile scams continue to target Australians. Meanwhile, Rubrik and MEDITECH are partnering to strengthen cyber resilience in hospitals, which is encouraging given the healthcare sector's ongoing vulnerability to attacks.

If your organisation ever faces a data breach, having a clear response plan ready in advance makes a significant difference — review and rehearse your incident response steps before you need them.

featured.title: Too Big to Fail – Hyperscale Data Centres Bring New Infrastructure Security Imperatives to Australia
featured.quote: Hyperscale data centres now critical infrastructure requiring new security approaches for Australia.
